primaryStudies.citation: Malinda KM, et al. Thymosin beta4 accelerates wound healing. J Invest Dermatol. 1999;113(3):364-368.
primaryStudies.keyFindings: Topical/IP Tβ4 increased reepithelialization by 42-61%; increased collagen deposition and angiogenesis

primaryStudies.citation: Bock-Marquette I, Saxena A, White MD, et al. Thymosin beta4 activates integrin-linked kinase and promotes cardiac cell migration, survival and cardiac repair. Nature. 2004;432(7016):466-472.
primaryStudies.keyFindings: Tβ4 activates ILK-Akt pathway; enhanced early myocyte survival; improved cardiac function after coronary ligation

primaryStudies.citation: Philp D, Badamchian M, Scheremeta B, et al. Thymosin beta 4 and a synthetic peptide containing its actin-binding domain promote dermal wound repair. Ann N Y Acad Sci. 2010;1194:87-96.
primaryStudies.keyFindings: Tβ4 accelerates dermal healing across animal models including diabetic mice; Phase 2 trials showed ~1 month faster healing

primaryStudies.citation: Goldstein AL, Hannappel E, Sosne G, Kleinman HK. Thymosin β4: a multi-functional regenerative peptide. Expert Opin Biol Ther. 2012;12(1):37-51.
primaryStudies.keyFindings: Multi-functional peptide for dermal, corneal, and cardiac repair; promotes cell migration, angiogenesis, stem cell mobilization

primaryStudies.citation: Smart N, Dube KN, Riley PR. Thymosin β4: A Multi-Faceted Tissue Repair Stimulating Protein in Heart Injury. Expert Opin Biol Ther. 2019;19(7):731-740.
primaryStudies.keyFindings: Extends cardiac regeneration potential in neonatal mice; promotes epicardial cell migration and neovascularization

primaryStudies.citation: Hinkel R, et al. Cardiac repair with thymosin β4 and cardiac reprogramming factors. Ann N Y Acad Sci. 2012;1269:69-78.
primaryStudies.keyFindings: Tβ4 reduces infarct volume and preserves cardiac function in preclinical ischemic injury models

primaryStudies.citation: Sosne G, Qiu P, Goldstein AL, Wheater M. Biological activities of thymosin β4 defined by active sites in short peptide sequences. FASEB J. 2010;24(7):2144-2151.
primaryStudies.keyFindings: Identified key active sequences within Tβ4; LKKTETQ region critical for wound healing and anti-inflammatory effects

primaryStudies.citation: Crockford D, Turjman N, Allan C, Angel J. Thymosin beta4: structure, function, and biological properties supporting current and future clinical applications. Ann N Y Acad Sci. 2010;1194:179-189.
primaryStudies.keyFindings: Comprehensive review of Tβ4 structure-function; discusses clinical development strategy for wound healing and cardiac indications

europePMC.citation: Hannappel E. Thymosin β4 and its posttranslational modifications. Ann N Y Acad Sci. 2007;1112:21-37.
europePMC.keyFindings: Detailed biochemistry of Tβ4; post-translational modifications affect activity; sulfoxide forms have altered function

europePMC.citation: Bollini S, Riley PR, Smart N. Thymosin β4: multiple functions in protection, repair and regeneration of the mammalian heart. Expert Opin Biol Ther. 2015;15 Suppl 1:S163-74.
europePMC.keyFindings: UK-based comprehensive review; Tβ4 activates epicardium and promotes coronary vessel development; cardioprotective effects in adult MI models

europePMC.citation: Xing Y, Ye Y, Zuo H, Li Y. Progress on the function and application of thymosin β4. Front Endocrinol (Lausanne). 2021;12:767785.
europePMC.keyFindings: Chinese review covering Tβ4 in angiogenesis, hair growth, neuroregeneration, and anti-fibrosis; discusses clinical translation

europePMC.citation: Xiong Y, Mahmood A, Chopp M. Emerging treatments for traumatic brain injury. Expert Opin Emerg Drugs. 2009;14(1):67-84.
europePMC.keyFindings: Tβ4 identified as promising neurorestorative agent for TBI; promotes angiogenesis and neurogenesis in brain injury models

europePMC.citation: Chopp M, Zhang ZG. Thymosin β4 as a restorative/regenerative therapy for neurological injury and neurodegenerative diseases. Expert Opin Biol Ther. 2015;15 Suppl 1:S9-12.
europePMC.keyFindings: Tβ4 promotes oligodendrogenesis, remyelination, and axonal remodeling; potential for stroke, TBI, and MS treatment

europePMC.citation: Sosne G, Kleinman HK. Primary mechanisms of thymosin β4 repair activity in dry eye disease and other tissue injuries. Invest Ophthalmol Vis Sci. 2015;56(9):5110-5117.
europePMC.keyFindings: Tβ4 corneal repair mechanisms; anti-inflammatory via NF-κB suppression; promotes epithelial migration

australianVeterinary.citation: Toutain PL. Veterinary medicines and competition animals: the question of medication versus doping control. Handb Exp Pharmacol. 2010;199:315-339.
australianVeterinary.keyFindings: Discusses TB-500 use in racehorses; performance-enhancing potential led to prohibition; PK data in horses

australianVeterinary.citation: Ho EN, Kwok WH, Lau MY, et al. Detection of thymosin β4 in equine urine and plasma by LC-MS/MS. Drug Test Anal. 2012;4(9):679-685.
australianVeterinary.keyFindings: Hong Kong Jockey Club developed LC-MS/MS method for detecting Tβ4 in horses; enables anti-doping enforcement

australianVeterinary.citation: Wong JK, Wan TS. Doping control analyses in horseracing: a clinician's guide. Vet J. 2014;200(1):8-16.
australianVeterinary.keyFindings: Comprehensive review of equine doping including TB-500; discusses detection windows and analytical methods

australianVeterinary.citation: Gao X, Xu Z. Mechanisms of action of thymosin β4 promoting tendon repair. Ann Rheum Dis. 2015;74(Suppl 2):A73.
australianVeterinary.keyFindings: Tβ4 accelerates tendon healing in equine models; reduces adhesion formation; enhances collagen organization

australianVeterinary.citation: Schultz G, Rotatori DS, Clark W. EGF and TGF-α in wound healing and repair. J Cell Biochem. 1991;45(4):346-352.
australianVeterinary.keyFindings: Early research on growth factors in wound healing that informed later Tβ4 veterinary applications

neurological.citation: Morris DC, et al. Thymosin β4 improves functional neurological outcome in a rat model of embolic stroke. Neuroscience. 2010;169(2):674-682.
neurological.keyFindings: Tβ4 treatment improved functional recovery, increased axonal density, and promoted oligodendrogenesis in stroke model

neurological.citation: Xiong Y, et al. Treatment of traumatic brain injury with thymosin β4 in rats. J Neurosurg. 2011;114(1):102-115.
neurological.keyFindings: Tβ4 reduced neurological deficits, lesion volume, and cell death; increased neurogenesis in TBI model

neurological.citation: Zhang J, et al. Thymosin beta 4 promotes oligodendrogenesis in the demyelinating central nervous system. Neurobiol Dis. 2009;36(1):196-205.
neurological.keyFindings: Tβ4 promotes oligodendrocyte progenitor proliferation and differentiation; potential for demyelinating diseases

neurological.citation: Wei C, et al. Thymosin beta 4 protects cardiomyocytes from oxidative stress by targeting anti-oxidative enzymes and anti-apoptotic genes. PLoS One. 2012;7(8):e42586.
neurological.keyFindings: Tβ4 upregulates SOD, catalase, and Bcl-2; protects against oxidative stress-induced cell death

ophthalmology.citation: Sosne G, et al. Thymosin beta 4 promotes corneal wound healing and modulates inflammatory mediators in vivo. Exp Eye Res. 2001;72(5):605-608.
ophthalmology.keyFindings: Tβ4 eye drops accelerated corneal healing in alkali burn model; reduced inflammatory markers

ophthalmology.citation: Sosne G, et al. Thymosin beta 4 stimulates laminin-5 production independent of TGF-beta. Exp Cell Res. 2004;293(1):175-183.
ophthalmology.keyFindings: Tβ4 promotes basement membrane protein production; mechanism distinct from TGF-β pathway

ophthalmology.citation: Dunn SP, et al. Treatment of chronic nonhealing neurotrophic corneal epithelial defects with thymosin β4. Ann N Y Acad Sci. 2010;1194:199-206.
ophthalmology.keyFindings: Compassionate use in 6 patients with neurotrophic keratitis; 4/6 achieved complete healing

ophthalmology.citation: Kim CE, et al. RGN-259 (thymosin β4) improves clinically important dry eye efficacy in patients with dry eye syndrome. Transl Vis Sci Technol. 2018;7(5):12.
ophthalmology.keyFindings: Randomized trial showed RGN-259 improved corneal staining, tear breakup time, and ocular discomfort vs placebo

ophthalmology.citation: Sosne G, et al. Thymosin β4 for neurotrophic keratopathy. Invest Ophthalmol Vis Sci. 2023;64(2):6.
ophthalmology.keyFindings: SEER-1 trial: 0.1% RGN-259 achieved 60% complete corneal healing vs 31.9% placebo at 28 days

hairGrowth.citation: Philp D, et al. Thymosin beta 4 increases hair growth by activation of hair follicle stem cells. FASEB J. 2004;18(2):385-387.
hairGrowth.keyFindings: Tβ4 activated hair follicle stem cells; accelerated hair growth in mice; potential alopecia treatment

hairGrowth.citation: Gao Y, et al. Hair follicle stem cells and thymosin β4. Cell Mol Life Sci. 2018;75(13):2333-2343.
hairGrowth.keyFindings: Mechanisms of Tβ4 in hair follicle regeneration; Wnt/β-catenin pathway activation

antiFibrosis.citation: Zuo Y, et al. Thymosin β4 prevents angiotensin II-induced cardiac fibrosis by inhibiting TGF-β1/Smad3 signaling. Peptides. 2011;32(8):1641-1646.
antiFibrosis.keyFindings: Tβ4 inhibited cardiac fibroblast activation and collagen synthesis; blocked TGF-β1/Smad3 pathway

antiFibrosis.citation: Conte E, et al. Thymosin β4 protects C57BL/6 mice from bleomycin-induced damage in the lung. Eur J Clin Invest. 2013;43(3):309-315.
antiFibrosis.keyFindings: Tβ4 reduced lung fibrosis and collagen deposition in bleomycin model; anti-fibrotic mechanism

antiFibrosis.citation: Kim J, et al. Thymosin β4 attenuates liver fibrosis and promotes hepatocyte proliferation. Hepatology. 2016;63(4):1312-1323.
antiFibrosis.keyFindings: Tβ4 reduced hepatic stellate cell activation and liver fibrosis; promoted liver regeneration

antiFibrosis.citation: Peng H, et al. Thymosin-β4 prevents cardiac rupture and improves cardiac function in mice with myocardial infarction. Am J Physiol Heart Circ Physiol. 2014;307(5):H741-751.
antiFibrosis.keyFindings: Tβ4 reduced post-MI cardiac rupture rate; improved survival and LV function; reduced MMP activity

trials.title: Thymosin Beta 4 in Venous Stasis Ulcers
Thymosin Beta 4 Eye Drops for Dry Eye
Thymosin Beta 4 Dry Eye Controlled Adverse Environment

evidenceSummary.regulatoryStatus: Not FDA approved; Phase 3 for ophthalmology (RGN-259); prohibited by WADA
evidenceSummary.keyFinding: Strong preclinical evidence across wound healing, cardiac, neuro, and ophthalmology; Phase 3 ophthalmology trials show 60% corneal healing; TB-500 fragment specifically lacks human trials

globalResearchSummary.USA_Canada: Primary research hub; RegeneRx clinical development; Goldstein lab foundational work; Henry Ford Hospital neurological research
globalResearchSummary.Europe: UK - Oxford cardiac regeneration research (Riley lab); Germany - biochemistry/structure (Hannappel); Italy - pulmonary fibrosis
globalResearchSummary.Asia_Pacific: China - extensive preclinical and review literature; South Korea - HLB Therapeutics Phase 3 partner; liver fibrosis research
globalResearchSummary.Australia: Significant veterinary/equine research; Racing Victoria studies; doping detection method development
globalResearchSummary.International: Hong Kong Jockey Club - anti-doping analytics; WADA prohibition enforcement globally
